summary: Remove a Person from a Group
description: Removes a person from a given group. Note that when removing the last group_id, the Group IDs can not be empty for an assignable resource or a non-admin person. Therefore, the removing the last group id from an assignable resource or a non-admin person is not allowed.

parameters.name: company_id
parameters.description:
Unique identifier for the company. This parameter accepts both formats:
- **Recommended**: Procore company ID (integer) - Use this for new integrations
- Legacy: LaborChart UUID format (uuid string...

schema.description: Response schema containing a list of assigned Group IDs.

group_ids.description: List of UUIDs representing the assigned Groups.
